HomePage.benefit1Desc: Watch any video in your language, without searching for translations.
HomePage.benefit2Desc: Paste a link, choose your language. Your translated video is ready quickly.
HomePage.benefit3Desc: Deliver international content to your community in their language.
HomePage.benefit4Desc: Your videos are stored securely and accessible only by you.
HomePage.platformsSubtitle: Copy and paste any public video link
HomePage.platformsExtra: + Dailymotion, Twitch clips, Reddit, and hundreds more
HomePage.teamTitle: A small team, a big ambition
HomePage.teamDesc1: SpottedYou Translator was born from a simple belief: the best technologies should be accessible to everyone, not just big teams with big budgets.
HomePage.teamDesc2: We're a tiny, passionate team that's assembled the most advanced tools available today to give you a magical experience — without you needing to understand what's going on under the hood.
HomePage.teamDesc3: Each translated video is a bridge between cultures. Thank you for being part of it. 🌍
HomePage.roadmap1Desc: Share directly to Instagram, Telegram, your mailbox or your YouTube channel.
HomePage.roadmap2Desc: Select the best moments from the video before starting the translation.
HomePage.roadmap3Desc: Generate a translated voice synchronized with the original video.
HomePage.roadmap4Desc: Measure the engagement of your translated videos by language and region.

LoginPage.subtitle: Access your translations space

BillingPage.title: Choose your plan
BillingPage.subtitle: Fair prices, adapted to your country.
BillingPage.proFeature2: 5 min per video (or 1h30/day with Groq key)
BillingPage.watermarkOptionDesc: Replace SpottedYou watermark with your own name/brand
BillingPage.editorsWhyDesc: If you are a professional content creator, the optimal sequence is: first download the translated source file, check it, edit it if necessary, then publish it — rather than publishing directly to networks. The Editors plan gives you access to the raw file before uploading, for maximum protection of your content.
BillingPage.freeCtaDesc: 3 videos offered. No credit card required.
BillingPage.faq1Q: Can I cancel at any time?
BillingPage.faq1A: Yes. The Pro subscription can be canceled at any time from your Stripe space. You retain access until the end of the period.
BillingPage.faq2Q: Are my videos deleted if I cancel?
BillingPage.faq2A: No. Your videos remain accessible in your library. Only the creation of new translations will be limited to the free quota.
BillingPage.faq3Q: How does the custom watermark work?
BillingPage.faq3A: With the Pro +5 option or the Editors plan, your name/brand replaces the SpottedYou watermark on all your translated videos.
BillingPage.faq4A: You receive the translated video file directly, without going through the web library. Ideal for manual editing or publishing.
BillingPage.securityNote: 🔒 Secure payment by Stripe · Cancel at any time · No hidden fees
BillingPage.loginRequired: Log in to manage your subscription.
